overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a medieval harbor town. The character moves from narrow cobblestone streets lined with half-timbered buildings onto wooden docks beside moored sailing ships on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval street with half-timbered buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the village street, passing villagers and market stalls

notable_agents.action: villager in red dress walking toward the camera
villager in brown tunic gesturing with hands

entered.detail: tall timber-framed house with white plaster and dark wooden beams
medieval shop front with wooden shutters and arched doorway
uneven cobblestone road surface with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval street lined with half-timbered buildings. The cobblestone path is uneven, and villagers in period clothing walk past, including a woman in a red dress approaching from the left and a gesturing villager on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone opening to harbor waterfront

events.description: exits narrow cobblestone street into open harbor area with visible water and ship masts

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing toward the waterfront as the enclosed street opens up to the harbor

entered.detail: large sailing ship with red hull and white sails docked at the pier
calm blue harbor water visible between the buildings
gray stone warehouse building with small windows

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed street to an open harbor area. The cobblestone gives way to wooden dock planks, and a large red-hulled galleon becomes visible docked on the right. Harbor water appears in the center background as the stone warehouse passes by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy wooden harbor dock with moored galleons and cargo

events.description: passing dock workers and cargo piles along the wooden pier

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the wooden docks passing dock workers and naval cargo

notable_agents.action: dock worker in red uniform standing near cargo barrels

entered.detail: large coils of hemp rope stacked on the dock
wooden cargo barrels and sacks piled near the ship
medieval stone towers and fortifications visible across the harbor

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the wide wooden dock beside the massive red-hulled galleon, which now dominates the right side of the frame. Dock workers in red uniforms attend to cargo including rope coils and wooden barrels. In the distance across the harbor, medieval castle towers are visible against the blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined medieval street into a wide, sunlit harbor. It begins by following Geralt through a narrow cobblestone path lined with half-timbered buildings, passing villagers in period clothing including a woman in a red dress. As the enclosed street opens up, the cobblestones give way to wooden dock planks and the view expands to reveal a stone warehouse on the left and the harbor water in the distance. The scene then shifts toward the waterfront, where a massive red-hulled galleon begins to dominate the right side of the frame. Finally, the camera moves along the wide dock past workers tending to barrels and rope coils, revealing distant medieval castle towers against a clear blue sky.
